value.title: Bald Eagle Coin
value.text: You obtained 'Bald Eagle Coin'. Smells like FREEDOM and TAX EVASION!

value.title: Samson
value.text: Shalom to you, good sir. I wish I could greet you with more mirth on this day, but alas, I have lost something of great importance.

value.title: Samson
value.text: It is as important to me as the locks on my head.

value.title: Joel
value.text: /sAnother dude who's all tangled up with his hair...

value.title: Samson
value.text: I'm sorry, what was that?

value.title: Joel
value.text: Oh! Um, ah, I mean, eh... What is you're, ah, looking for, my dude?

value.title: Samson
value.text: Have you perhaps stumbled upon a large, leather-bound book by any chance in this area?

value.title: Joel
value.text: Unfortunately I did not, man. I am sorry about that.

value.title: Samson
value.text: That is a real shame...

value.title: Samson
value.text: But if you do find it somewhere, please let me know right away.

value.title: Fren
value.text: vat hapen if yu do not find it?

value.title: Samson
value.text: Are you certain you truly want to know the answer to that, my small gremloid friend?

value.title: Joel
value.text: Alright, I'll see what I can do.

value.title: Samson
value.text: Thank you very much. Godspeed on your quest, young men! Shalom!

value.title: Samson
value.text: Hallelujah, my brothers! You have found it!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Hey, no problem, man. Glad something finally went right today.

value.title: Samson
value.text: Indeed, young one. Peace be upon you.

value.title: Samson
value.text: As a reward, I will give you the recipe for my hair oil from this. Just a moment.

value.title: Joel
value.text: Uhh, I don't think I've seen any notes written on this.

value.title: Samson
value.text: I regret to tell you this, brothers, but this is not the book I was seeking.

value.title: Fren
value.text: ooo neeeej

value.title: Samson
value.text: But it appears to be a highlighted passage... Leviticus 14:40.

value.title: Samson
value.text: 'If a man's hair falls out from his head, he is bald; he is clean.'

value.title: Samson
value.text: What is so significant about this?

value.title: Fren
value.text: háhá b a l d

value.title: Samson
value.text: What? Are you mocking me???

value.title: Joel
value.text: Nononono, that's not true at all! It's totally a misunderstanding. Isn't that right, Fren?

value.title: Fren
value.text: háhá myega b a l d

value.title: Samson
value.text: I will not tolerate this ridicule anymore! I curse you in the name of the Lord!

value.title: Samson
value.text: Gwrarrhh!!!

value.title: Grill
value.text: You obtained 'Grill'. George Foreman branded.

value.title: Joel
value.text: YOOOOOO! My main man, Michael of Jabronos!

value.title: Mike
value.text: Joey Vsauce! Hey! Waddup, dude!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Fren told me there was some sorta curse in the land by some cult or something.

value.title: Mike
value.text: A doomsday cult?

value.title: Joel
value.text: Something like that. You heard anything about it?

value.title: Mike
value.text: Naaaah, nothin' like that lately. But hey, man, can you do me a favor?

value.title: Joel
value.text: Sure, man, anything for my main man Mike!

value.title: Mike
value.text: I was at the beach a few days ago, and I lost my favorite body pil- uh, I mean, BEACH TOWEL.

value.title: Mike
value.text: It's got Saitama on it, and now I've got nothing to hug when chat calls me 'bald' or 'red' on stream anymore.

value.title: Mike
value.text: Also, my GERD gets worse without it.

value.title: Fren
value.text: do nat worri, it vill be araund hiere sumwere

value.title: Joel
value.text: Wait, you're telling me you don't have a security blanket, but a security... beach towel?

value.title: Mike
value.text: Uuuhhh yeah, a 'security' beach towel. It's got, like... so many COMFY memories.

value.title: Joel
value.text: Hey, man, I understand.

value.title: Joel
value.text: ...Wait a minute, I thought you HATED comfy things.

value.title: Mike
value.text: SHADDAP!!! Are you gonna help me or not??

value.title: Joel
value.text: Yeah! I'm off now! Gonna check the beach for your... uh, beach towel!

value.title: Mike
value.text: Git goin' and good luck!

value.title: Mike
value.text: Did you find it?

value.title: Joel
value.text: Yeah, I think so! ...Though, isn't it kinda thick for a beach tow-

value.title: Mike
value.text: Thank you so much, man!!! Thought I lost it for real this time.

value.title: Joel
value.text: Aw, no problem, dude! Hope this helps your GERD get better.

value.title: Mike
value.text: WHAT DA HELL?!?

value.title: Mike
value.text: Did you do this to me, Joel???

value.title: Joel
value.text: BAHAHAHAHAHAHAAAA! BALD!

value.title: Fren
value.text: de NO of HAIR! híhí!

value.title: Mike
value.text: It's YOU, Joel! YOU'RE the Doomsday cult! You cursed me to be BALD!

value.title: Joel
value.text: WHOA! It's nothing like that! I... I just wasn't expecting you to suddenly turn baaalahaHAHAHA!!!

value.title: Mike
value.text: YOU KNOW WHAT? SCREW YOU, JOEL!

value.title: Mike
value.text: Go find an electric toothbrush for me! They can stimulate blood vessels in the scalp and reverse baldness. Now GO!

value.title: Mike
value.text: Oh thank God, you found the toothbrush, give it to me

value.title: Joel
value.text: Okay, here ya go.

value.title: Mike
value.text: Oooooh, I can feel the hair coming back already.

value.title: Joel
value.text: Mike, I think it's doing quite the opposite, actually.

value.title: Mike
value.text: You don't know shit, Joel, there is definitely something going on up there.

value.title: Joel
value.text: Yeah, I can see that, but you don't.

value.title: Mike
value.text: Are you serious? WHAT THE FUCK, JOEY?!!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Hey, don't blame me, you did this to yourself.

value.title: Mike
value.text: Is this gonna be another Wigsaw bit? Is this how you're gonna torture me?

value.title: Joel
value.text: I wasn't even planning on that, man...

value.title: Joel
value.text: But now that you've mentioned it...

value.title: Mike
value.text: Do not even fockin' think about doin' this shit.

value.title: Joel
value.text: Okay, man, I won't.

value.title: Mike
value.text: If you don't find anything that can remotely cheer me up now, don't even bother coming back.

value.title: Mike
value.text: What is this?

value.title: Joel
value.text: Found this nearby and it reminded me of you.

value.title: Joel
value.text: So I've figured it would be great as a gift for you, to make up for the baldness on your head.

value.title: Mike
value.text: Oh, Joel, that is actually sweet of you. I wouldn't guess in a million years that you would do such a thing.

value.title: Mike
value.text: Thank you

value.title: Joel
value.text: Yeah, no problem, man. You're still my friend, right?

value.title: Mike
value.text: Of course!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Uh oh.

value.title: Mike
value.text: This. Cannot. Be real. HOW IS THIS EVEN POSSIBLE?!!

value.title: Mike
value.text: This fockin' sucks, dude…

value.title: Joel
value.text: Calm down, man. It ain't that horrible.

value.title: Mike
value.text: I AM A FOCKIN' SKELETON NOW, JOEL!!!

value.title: Mike
value.text: WHY ARE YOU DOING THIS TO ME!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Mike, look at the bright side (of your head lmfao).

value.title: Joel
value.text: The baldness does look good on you. You should embrace it now.

value.title: Mike
value.text: I hate you, Joel.

value.title: Statuette
value.text: You obtained 'Statuette'. A kitschy, whimsical gift to encourage a bald friend.

value.title: D*lto
value.text: HeLlo tHeRE...

value.title: Joel
value.text: HOLY JESUS WHAT ARE YOU?

value.title: Joel
value.text: GET AWAY FROM ME NOW!!!

value.title: D*lto
value.text: Can yOu HElp mE..?

value.title: Joel
value.text: You look like you're already beyond that, man

value.title: Joel
value.text: Or whatever the hell you are anyways.

value.title: D*lto
value.text: Am KiNd of hOmELeSs... NeEd a bED...

value.title: D*lto
value.text: PLeAse...

value.title: Joel
value.text: If I get you this bed for you, will you leave this bitch of an earth for good?

value.title: D*lto
value.text: YeEeSss.. I WilL... LeAve yOu AlOne...

value.title: Fren
value.text: butt yu vent tu him frist???

value.title: Joel
value.text: I do not know what you are talking about...

value.title: D*lto
value.text: ThAnk YoU, kINd StrAnGeR...

value.title: Joel
value.text: Whatever you say, 'buddy'.

value.title: D*lto
value.text: fiNAllY... sOmE SlEep...

value.title: Joel
value.text: Yeah, maybe your last!

value.title: Fren
value.text: mmm yummi

value.title: Joel
value.text: I didn't trust you in the slightest, so I did what I had to do...

value.title: D*lto
value.text: wHaT... dID yoU..?

value.title: Joel
value.text: Get fucked.

value.title: Saitama Body Pillow
value.text: You obtained 'Saitama Body Pillow'. Saitama is posed like a French girl, giving 'thumbs up' and saying 'OK.'

value.title: Chris
value.text: WHAT’S UP BRO? DO YA WANT TO BECOME A GAJILLIONAIRE JUST LIKE ME?!!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Wha...

value.title: Chris
value.text: IN ORDER TO BE RICH LIKE ME, YA NEED TO INVEST IN VARGCOIN, BRO!

value.title: Chris
value.text: IT’S LIKE THE FUTURE, BRO! EVERYONE BASICALLY USES IT NOW!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Sorry, but I don’t-

value.title: Chris
value.text: WHAT? YA THINK THIS IS DUMB OR SOMETHIN', BRO? YA THINK YOU'RE FUNNY?

value.title: Joel
value.text: I just don't believe in this kind of creepto scam shit, y'know?

value.title: Chris
value.text: SO YA SAYIN' THAT YOU'RE OLD? GET IN WITH THE TIMES, BRO.

value.title: Chris
value.text: THOSE STUPID NERD DOLLARS WILL NEVER MATCH THE AURA THE VARGCOIN HAS, BRO.

value.title: Joel
value.text: Whatever...

value.title: Chris
value.text: WHAT THE FUCK IS THIS, BRO? ARE YA STUPID OR SOMETHIN'?

value.title: Fren
value.text: one dolar

value.title: Chris
value.text: I DON’T WANT THIS! THIS IS WORTHLESS!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Is it really, though?

value.title: Chris
value.text: YEAH, BRO! I KNOW WHAT I'M DOIN'. I'M BASICALLY A GENIUS, BRO!

value.title: Chris
value.text: I CAN BE THE NEXT PRESIDENT, BRO!

value.title: Chris
value.text: BUT I DON'T WANT TO, BECAUSE I'M VERY RICH NOW!

value.title: Joel
value.text: Suuuree...
Please imagine that Chris gets balded from a bald eagle flying by, also snatching the dollar from his hand.

value.title: Chris
value.text: NOOOOOO! MY WIG!!! HOW WILL I SELL MY SCAM COURSES NOW?!!

value.title: Chris
value.text: I MEAN, BUSINESS OPPORTUNITIES, HAHA.

value.title: Fren
value.text: haha :)

value.title: Chris
value.text: I GOTTA THINK OF SOMETHIN' TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF LIKE, RIGHT NOW, BRO.

value.title: Joel
value.text: Really? You are still gonna do this?

value.title: Chris
value.text: YEAH, I LOVE DOIN' THIS SHIT.

value.title: Chris
value.text: SEEIN' THEM CRYIN' OVER THEIR LOST MONEY, THAT IS VERY FUNNY, BRO.

value.title: Chris
value.text: NOW STAY AWAY FROM ME, BRO. I DON'T WANT TO SEE YA EVER AGAIN.
